仇深似海，红颜相伴！
监狱女医生伍娟：“小松，终于熬到头了，出狱后以最快的速度找个女人成家，你个小混蛋没女人活不了，娟姐怕你熬不住出事！”
青梅竹马的寡妇欣姐：“小松！今晚姐陪你血战到底，你死了，姐绝不独活，就去下面陪你，下辈子做你媳妇！”
黑二代小萝莉妃儿：“松哥，姑奶奶只做老大的女人，别的男人配不上我。”
千亿富婆梦真：“小松，姐的男人必须是人中之龙，文武双全，盖世无双！你能征服我吗？

曾经以为变成孤儿，未曾想风流老爸生前居然给我留下诸多弟弟妹妹！

于是，喋血江湖路上，不断有继母出现，更有兄弟兄妹，情深意重，浪子回头。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/958fc7889424ab970c693b14c6cbdc87","author":"江南才子","author_id":"","book_id":"7559401386094382105","book_name":"黑道：红颜伴我野性江湖路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8687人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7559401664902332953","read_count":"8687","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"704397"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"324","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主,黑道","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8604dfa96dc9a496ac2389bf42a92e26~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286326&x-signature=BW6r2aUcevucXtyB6MYfjBH2Vyg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52896273455","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212212067FFB6D0560EA8F2C29C0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3668,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1298},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1764832926,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment
